15.kj: [phrase] be able, befall, being, catch, [idiom] certainly, (cause to) come (on, to, to hand), deliver, be enough (cause to) find(-ing, occasion, out), get (hold upon), [idiom] have

15.gl: properly, to mark (so as to be recognized), i.e. to remember; by implication, to mention;  to be male
15.kj: [idiom] burn (incense), [idiom] earnestly, be male, (make) mention (of), be mindful, recount, record(-er), remember, make to be remembered, bring (call, come, keep, put) to (in) re
15.dv: a primitive root; also as denominative from H2145 (זָכָר)

15.gl: properly, to be smooth, i.e. (by implication) to escape (as if by slipperiness); causatively, to release or rescue; specifically, to bring forth young, emit sparks
15.kj: deliver (self), escape, lay, leap out, let alone, let go, preserve, save, [idiom] speedily, [idiom] surely.

15.gl: a city (a place guarded by waking or a watch) in the widest sense (even of a mere encampment or post)
15.kj: Ai (from margin), city, court (from margin), town.
15.dv: or (in the plural) עָר; or עָיַר; (Judges 10:4), from H5782 (עוּר)

15.gl: ruddy i.e. a human being (an individual or the species, mankind, etc.)
15.kj: [idiom] another, [phrase] hypocrite, [phrase] common sort, [idiom] low, man (mean, of low degree), person.
